calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Feb-09-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-19-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Jeff Daniel, Esq., for Plaintiff: Provivian National Bank.
No appearance by the Defendant: Soraya Merlos.
11:40 am. - Based on evidence and exhibit 1 attachment filed, declaration by Lisa Hart,
The Court taken this matter under submission.
Proposed judgment is under submission.

Feb. 19,2004. The Court grants Judgment for Plaintiff: Providian National Bank and against Defendant: Soraya Merlos as follows:
Principal of $4,313.02
Prejudgment interest of $340.30
Attorney's fees of $775.00
Costs of $165.30
Total $5,593.62
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2003 Set For Trial On Feb-09-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
